title: abelia uniflora
intro: Abelia uniflora, also known as the one-flowered abelia or Korean abelia, is a flowering plant native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant effects. Abelia uniflora can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
